summary: Comprehensive testing of LD Finance 4 new features completed. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All 12 frontend features verified working correctly. New features: 1) FloatingTransaction calculator toggle, 2) Dashboard pie chart for expense categories, 3) Reports page timeline chart (Deuda vs Ahorro), 4) Transactions page calculator toggle. Shared transaction UI only appears when user has connections (expected behavior).

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting: '<span> cannot be a child of <tbody>' - This is a React hydration warning that doesn't affect functionality but should be fixed for cleaner code (same issue from iteration 7)
Chart shows 'Se necesitan al menos 2 periodos de datos' when only 1 period of data exists - this is expected behavior, not a bug

action_items: MINOR: Fix HTML nesting warnings in Dashboard.jsx budget table - wrap table rows properly without span elements inside tbody/table
critical_code_review_comments: FloatingTransaction.jsx: QuickCalculator component correctly implements basic operations (+, -, *, /) with 'Usar' button to set amount
FloatingTransaction.jsx: Shared transaction UI (checkbox + contact selector) correctly only appears when connections.length > 0
Dashboard.jsx: CategoryPieChart component correctly filters expenses by selected month and calculates percentages
Reports.jsx: Timeline chart with Semana/Mes/Ano filters correctly calls /api/reports/timeline?period=X
Reports.jsx: Before/After comparison cards replaced with timeline LineChart showing debt vs savings over time
Transactions.jsx: QuickCalculator component duplicated (same as FloatingTransaction) - could be extracted to shared component
Backend /api/reports/timeline: Correctly returns timeline data with period, label, debt, savings fields
seed_data_creation: Test user 'test-user-1776307963563' with transactions, debt, and savings goal created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features fully tested and working: 1) FloatingTransaction calculator toggle with QuickCalculator widget, 2) Dashboard CategoryPieChart showing expense categories %, 3) Reports page timeline chart (Deuda vs Ahorro en el Tiempo) with Semana/Mes/Ano filters, 4) Transactions page calculator toggle. Shared transaction UI only appears when user has accepted connections. Auth uses Google OAuth - authenticated pages tested via session cookie injection.

floating_transaction_calculator.details: Calculator toggle button shows/hides QuickCalculator widget. Basic operations (+, -, *, /) work correctly. 'Usar' button sets the calculated amount in the form.

floating_transaction_shared.details: Shared transaction checkbox and contact selector only appear when user has connections (connections.length > 0). Test user had no connections so UI was hidden - this is expected behavior.

dashboard_pie_chart.details: Pie chart shows expense categories with percentages and legend. Correctly filters by selected month. Shows 'Gastos por Categoria' title with total amount.

reports_timeline_chart.details: Timeline chart card with 'Deuda vs Ahorro en el Tiempo' title. Filter buttons (Semana/Mes/Ano) switch chart data period. Shows placeholder when < 2 periods of data.

reports_timeline_api.details: Returns timeline array with period, label, debt, savings fields. Correctly calculates historical debt/savings values.

transactions_calculator.details: Calculator toggle in transactions page dialog works same as FloatingTransaction. 'Usar' button sets amount.

before_after_cards_removed.details: Old before/after comparison cards in Reports page replaced with timeline LineChart showing debt vs savings over time.

Backend: GET /api/reports/timeline?period=week returns timeline data
Backend: GET /api/reports/timeline?period=year returns timeline data
Backend: GET /api/reports/timeline defaults to month period
Backend: Timeline data structure has required fields (period, label, debt, savings)
Backend: GET /api/connections returns empty array for user with no connections
Backend: GET /api/dashboard includes all_transactions for pie chart
Backend: Dashboard transactions have category field for grouping
Backend: GET /api/reports endpoint exists and returns data
Backend: Reports has debt and savings totals
Backend: POST /api/transactions/shared endpoint exists
Backend: GET /api/categories returns expense and income lists
Backend: POST /api/transactions with calculated amount works
Frontend: Dashboard loads with pie chart visible
Frontend: Floating add transaction button opens dialog
Frontend: Calculator toggle in FloatingTransaction works
Frontend: Calculator operations (+, -, *, /) work correctly
Frontend: Calculator 'Usar' button sets amount
Frontend: Reports page loads with timeline chart card
Frontend: Timeline filter buttons (Semana/Mes/Ano) are clickable
Frontend: Annual comparison card visible in Reports
Frontend: Monthly chart card visible in Reports
Frontend: Transactions page loads correctly
Frontend: Calculator toggle in Transactions dialog works
